quality.completeness: High. Contains all standard fields (slug, name, type, rarity, attunement, description, source).
quality.clarity: High. The description clearly outlines charge mechanics, spell details (spell name, save DC), and the destruction condition.
quality.formatting: Good. Uses standard markdown for links and references.

mechanics.destruction_trigger: Roll d20 on expending the last charge; on a 1, the wand is destroyed.

recommendations: Verify that the target of the `[_web_](#web)` link resolves correctly within the target documentation system.
Confirm that 'spellcaster' is the precise requirement intended for attunement, as some items are more generic.
